text_block_list.text:
I spot Mejiro Palmer and some other<n>runners
training for a race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... What a workout!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I shouldn't be so worn out doing this<n>kinda thing
though. Especially since<n>our next race is giving
serious<n>next-level vibes...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: That just means we're next leveltoo! This race 'bout to be a party forreal!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
We gotta keep the party vibes going!<n>We'll go
hard with our runaway strat<n>and light the stands
on fire!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Totally! We gotta get, uh... lit! Because<n>we're next
level!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh,I know! Wanna see if my freestyle<n>racer
friends are up for a race?<n>Running with them just
hits different.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: The freestyle racers?! Bet! That<n>sounds fire!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's get going then! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hey, you! You can come along too if<n>you want!

Mejiro Palmer invites me just as<n>their
conversation piques my interest.

I tag along out of a combination of<n>curiosity and
concern, and when we<n>arrive...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, everyone! It's been aaages!<n>You guys are
lookin' great!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Palmer! Look at that tracksuit... I<n>guess that
means you got in to<n>Tracen Academy!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Waheeeey! How's it goin',<n>everybody?! Lemme
hear ya scream!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Woo, woo!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Is this person with you too? Omigosh,<n>you've got
a badge. Are you a<n>trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I kinda dragged 'em along.

All the Umamusume here have their<n>own reasons
for gathering here to run<n>in this unofficial race.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: So, what's the deal today?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
We've got a race comin' up, so<n>we're here to get
the vibes goin'.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
So you wanna revisit the good old<n>days, huh? Hell
yeah! I'll help you<n>out!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Then I'll race you! Work's been<n>stressing me out,
so I'm ready to pop<n>off!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Plus, I wanna see what Tracen<n>Academy's really
made of. I haven't<n>given up on getting in yet!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Let's do it!

The race is held on a quiet country<n>road, but it's
still a sight to behold.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Haha, we finished at the same time!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you're the real deal, Palmer!<n>You've really
improved! You too,<n>Helios! I've never seen
anyone blast<n>to the front like that!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you guys were legit on fire! Iknew I had to go hard or go home!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
This takes me back to my amateur<n>days. I knew
coming here would<n>make for a great escape!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You helped bring back my memories<n>of this place
today, Helios.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's like you're my sun or something!<n>For real
though, thanks!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Same, bestie! I made a ton of new<n>friends and got
to run a bunch! Today<n>high-key slapped!
choice_data_list: You two make a good duo.
You two make a good duo.

So for you, "running away" embodies your will to
improve.

So for you, "running away" embodies your will to
improve.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Same, bestie! I made a ton of new<n>friends and got
to run a bunch! Today<n>high-key slapped!
choice_data_list: You two make a good duo.
You two make a good duo.

So for you, "running away" embodies your will to
improve.

So for you, "running away" embodies your will to
improve.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh, we're a perfect pair! Let's<n>have a blast at
the actual race too!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Bet! And after this vibe check, we'regonna serve on the racecourse! Nocap!

On the day of the race, the perfect pair<n>start the
race by seizing a huge lead...
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
(No way! Palmer's absolutely slaying!<n>I can barely
keep up!)

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: (But feel that fiery energy! She'sgiving off main character vibes, like,for real !)

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: GO FOR THE WIN!<n>PAAAAALMERRRRR!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: HAAAAAHHHHH!

Mejiro Palmer triumphantly takes<n>first place, with
Daitaku Helios right<n>behind her!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! AWESOME!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Congrats!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Bestie! That won't be the<n>last time I make
a great escape!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ack!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Whoa?!

With only a little further to go, the two<n>runners lose
their steam and fail to<n>keep ahead of the pack
before<n>reaching the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(We didn't make it! But... I feel like I<n>saw the path
to victory!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(I don't care if people think I'm just<n>some
runaway fool, I'm not letting<n>things end this way!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I hate losing, but if I'm gonna be a<n>fool, then I'm
gonna be a fool to the<n>end!

Mejiro Palmer stands on the track,<n>eyes shining
bright with intense<n>determination.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I'm gonna run with all I've got.<n>And when I
do, I'll see just how big<n>the world really is.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
We'll be there to cheer for you guys<n>too, so break
a leg, Palmer and<n>Helios!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, bet! Can't have an after-party<n>without the
whole gang there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You always get so ahead of yourself,<n>Helios!
Anyway, let's run away<n>toward a future full of
fun!

On the day of the race, the perfect pair<n>start the
race by seizing a huge lead...
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: YEEEEEAAAAAHHHHH!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: (For real?! That was a total serve,<n>Palmer!)

That day, everyone gets to witness<n>how a little
escape can lead to big<n>things.
